pages.text: When hung next to a $(item)Bed$(), this Dream Weaver will add $(item)Night Vision$() to a player when they wake up from a good nights sleep. If the Dream Weaver is corrupted by a nearby $(l:artifacts/dream_weavers/nightmares)Dream Weaver of Nightmares$(/l) the Weaver will instead inflict $(item)Blindness$().

pages.title: Secondary effects
pages.text: The Dream Weaver of Intensity also has the secondary effect of boosting the effect of the other Dream Weavers (except the $(l:artifacts/dream_weavers/nightmares)Dream Weaver of Nightmares$(/l)) so that either they grant a stronger but shorter-lasting effect or their effects' duration is increased.
